levels.teachingHint: A row and column both summing to 1 cross at one forced cell — find it.
A row summing to 1 has exactly one filled cell. Cross-reference columns to find it.
A column summing to 1 has exactly one filled cell. Cross-reference rows to find it.
A row summing to 5 has exactly one empty cell. Where must the empty be?
A column summing to 5 has exactly one empty cell.
A sum=5 row and a sum=5 column each have one empty cell. Their intersection is informative.
No extremes here. Combine row and column clues to narrow the grid.
